item.title:
Tip of the day:
Almost every capability, built in skill, platform connection, command, etc is all ...
item.description:
Tip of the day:
Almost every capability, built in skill, platform connection, command, etc is all documented heavily on our docs pages. Check that out:
It's right here - any edits I should make?
https://t.co/NB6yKpsPpS
--- @Teknium | ❤️ 18 | 🔁 1 | 💬 2 | 👁 412
item.author: @Teknium

item.title:
🎚️CodexBar 0.21
Abacus AI provider, Codex Pro $100 support, safer OpenAI web extras, fixed local co...
item.description:
🎚️CodexBar 0.21
Abacus AI provider, Codex Pro $100 support, safer OpenAI web extras, fixed local cost scanning, z. ai 5h quotas, Antigravity/Cursor/Ollama fixes, faster refreshes, macOS 26 icon fix and more.
The big issue with too much CPU usage was an OpenAI web fetch and is now disabled for new installs. Also keychain issues are resolved. Shoutout to @RatulSarna for maintaining. https://t.co/GSzgKVfBLL
--- @steipete | ❤️ 59 | 🔁 2 | 💬 6 | 👁 3889
item.author: @steipete

item.title: I’d love to have AI scan my entire podcast transcript library then point out top transcript clips fo...
item.description:
I’d love to have AI scan my entire podcast transcript library then point out top transcript clips for each video for my review then actually go into the videos and clip them.
Is this possible?
--- @petergyang | ❤️ 3 | 🔁 0 | 💬 9 | 👁 915
item.author: @petergyang
